cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a beauty salon around seasonal sensitive-skin repair using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: consult-first experience, gentle cleansing and soothing care, no medical claims
input.audience_segment: local women dealing with seasonal redness, dryness, and fragile skin

mustInclude: scene or problem based opening around seasonal sensitivity
trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects concern and booking window

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a pre-event rescue appointment route for a shopping-mall beauty salon
input.offer_info: single-session prep care, appointment-first, no long-term efficacy promise
input.audience_segment: users preparing for dates, weddings, photo shoots, and holiday gatherings

mustInclude: boundary that this is state management, not miracle repair

cases.label: long_term_case

input.strategy_route: Write a soft re-engagement message for existing beauty-salon clients approaching a seasonal skin shift
input.offer_info: follow-up reminder, no blanket discount, based on prior visit rhythm
input.audience_segment: past clients who completed one or two visits but have not returned recently

mustInclude: CTA tied to timing or current skin state

input.strategy_route: Rewrite a beauty-salon promo that currently overuses before-after claims and absolute efficacy wording
input.offer_info: trial package with consult and booking support
